'''Harlan''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] alive around [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. She was once attacked by an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] that could control the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. The alien tried to use [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]] against Harlan, who defended herself using a skill known as [[Force barrier/Legends|Force of Will]]. On another occasion, Harlan fought a non–Force-sensitive guard and tired to use [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]] to strike the guard in the head.<ref name="JASB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Harlan appears in ''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' as an example to illustrate how to use two Force powers in dice rolls. Some fans speculated that Harlan could be an in-universe character and a member of the [[New Jedi Order]] depicted in this [[West End Games]] roleplaying sourcebook. When asked about this idea on the [[StarWars.com Message Boards]], [[Leland Chee]] stated "I don't believe she was intended to be an actual in-universe character."<ref name="TOS">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?forumID=24&start=30&threadID=1798&msRange=15|thread=Unknown thread|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|nobackup=1}}</ref>
